title: rosa gallica var. hispida
intro: Rosa gallica var. hispida, also known as the Gallic rose or French rose, is a type of rose species native to Europe. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Rosa gallica var. hispida include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and alleviate symptoms of colds and fever. Rosa gallica var. hispida is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and salves, and is also used in perfumery and cosmetics for its fragrant and skin-benefiting properties.
